company.name_jp: 株式会社ブリリアント

research_notes: Researched on 2026-06-26. Company established August 1995. Capital: 86 million JPY. Offices in Tokyo (Tachikawa) and Yamanashi (Fuefuki). Business: System development, software development, information services, hardware/software sales. CEO: 井上清美. ISO9001 certified. KIA member. Recipient of multiple Yamanashi Advertising Awards. Recognized as 'Yamanashi Erumin' (diversity certification).
